subjects.invitedToWorkspace: You're invited to join {{workspaceName}} on Qarote

subjects.verifyEmailChange: Verify your new email address - Qarote
subjects.planRenewed: Welcome Back to Qarote - {{plan}} Plan Renewed!
subjects.completePayment: Action required: Complete your payment for {{workspaceName}}
subjects.updateAvailable: Qarote {{latestVersion}} is available - Update your instance

common.ifButtonDoesntWork: If the button above doesn't work, you can also copy and paste this link into your browser:
common.automatedNotification: This is an automated notification from Qarote.

verification.previewSignup: Verify your email to get started with Qarote
verification.bodySignup: Thank you for signing up for Qarote! To complete your registration and access your account, please verify your email address by clicking the button below.
verification.bodyEmailChange: You've requested to change your email address on Qarote. To confirm this change, please verify your new email address by clicking the button below.
verification.expiryWarning: This verification link will expire in {{expiryHours}} hours. If you didn't request this {{requestType}}, you can safely ignore this email.
verification.havingTrouble: If you're having trouble, feel free to contact our

welcome.title: Welcome to Qarote!
welcome.bodyWithWorkspace: Welcome to Qarote! Your workspace {{workspaceName}} has been successfully set up on the {{planName}} plan.
welcome.bodyWithoutWorkspace: Welcome to Qarote! Your account has been successfully created on the {{planName}} plan. Get started by creating your first workspace!
welcome.workspaceExplanation: A workspace helps you organize your RabbitMQ servers, manage team members, and track your monitoring data. You can create one right away!
welcome.canMonitorNow: You can now start monitoring your RabbitMQ clusters and managing your message queues with ease.
welcome.canMonitorAfterWorkspace: Once you create your workspace, you can start monitoring your RabbitMQ clusters and managing your message queues with ease.
welcome.featuresHeadingWithoutWorkspace: What you can do once you create your workspace:
welcome.featureCreateWorkspace: 🏢 Create your first workspace to get started
welcome.featureSetupAlerts: 🔔 Set up alerts for your queues
welcome.featureMemoryMetrics: 🧠 View detailed memory metrics and optimization tips
welcome.featurePrioritySupport: 🎯 Get priority support and expert insights
welcome.needHelp: If you need help getting started, check out our

invitation.preview: {{inviterName}} has invited you to join {{workspaceName}} on Qarote
invitation.title: You're invited to join {{workspaceName}}!
invitation.body: {{inviterName}} ({{inviterEmail}}) has invited you to join the {{workspaceName}} workspace on Qarote.
invitation.aboutQarote: Qarote is a powerful RabbitMQ monitoring dashboard that helps teams manage their message queues effectively.
invitation.expiryWarning: This invitation will expire in 7 days. If you didn't expect this invitation, you can safely ignore this email.
invitation.havingTrouble: If you're having trouble, feel free to contact our

passwordReset.title: Reset your password
passwordReset.body: We received a request to reset the password for your Qarote account. Click the button below to create a new password.
passwordReset.expiryWarning: This link will expire in {{expiryHours}} hours. If you didn't request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email.
passwordReset.securityNote: For security, this password reset link can only be used once.

alertNotification.body: New alert(s) detected on your RabbitMQ server {{serverName}} in workspace {{workspaceName}}.
alertNotification.managePreferences: You can manage alert thresholds and preferences in your
alertNotification.automatedNotice: This is an automated notification from Qarote. You're receiving this because new alerts were detected on your monitored server.

paymentConfirmation.title: Payment Confirmed
paymentConfirmation.body: Your payment of {{amount}} has been successfully processed.

paymentActionRequired.title: Payment Action Required
paymentActionRequired.body: Your payment for {{workspaceName}} requires attention. Please update your payment method to continue using Qarote.
paymentActionRequired.warning: If payment is not completed, your subscription may be interrupted.

trialEnding.title: Your trial is ending soon
trialEnding.body: Your {{plan}} trial for {{workspaceName}} will end soon. {{usageText}}
trialEnding.keepAccess: Upgrade now to keep access to all features.

upgradeConfirmation.title: Welcome to the {{plan}} Plan!
upgradeConfirmation.body: Your upgrade to the {{plan}} plan has been confirmed. Thank you for your support!

welcomeBack.title: Welcome Back to Qarote!
welcomeBack.body: Your {{plan}} plan has been renewed. Welcome back!

upcomingInvoice.title: Upcoming Invoice
upcomingInvoice.body: Your next invoice for {{workspaceName}} is coming up.

updateAvailable.title: A new version of Qarote is available!
updateAvailable.body: Qarote {{latestVersion}} is now available. You are currently running {{currentVersion}}.

licenseDelivery.title: Your Qarote License is Ready!
licenseDelivery.body: Your {{tier}} license for Qarote has been generated and is ready to use.
licenseDelivery.installInstructions: To install, place the license file in your Qarote installation directory.

licenseRenewal.title: Your Qarote License Has Been Renewed
licenseRenewal.body: Your {{tier}} license has been successfully renewed.

licenseExpirationReminder.title: Your Qarote License Expires Soon
licenseExpirationReminder.body: Your {{tier}} license will expire in {{daysUntilExpiration}} days.
licenseExpirationReminder.warning: After expiration, Enterprise features will no longer be available.

licenseExpired.title: Your Qarote License Has Expired
licenseExpired.body: Your {{tier}} license has expired. Enterprise features are no longer available.
licenseExpired.revertNotice: Your instance has reverted to Community Edition features.

licensePaymentFailed.title: License Payment Failed
licensePaymentFailed.body: We were unable to process your license payment. Please update your payment method to maintain your license.
licensePaymentFailed.warning: If payment is not resolved, your license may be suspended.

licenseCancellation.title: Your Qarote License Has Been Cancelled
licenseCancellation.body: Your {{tier}} license has been cancelled and will remain active until {{endDate}}.
licenseCancellation.notice: After this date, your instance will revert to Community Edition features.
